ingredients: 1 piece milkfish (bangus), cleaned with scales on and guts removed
Toyomansi for dipping: soy sauce plus lemon/calamansi juice (optional)
steps: Wash milkfish and pat dry. Rub salt inside the cavity and over the fish.
Mix tomato, onion and ginger; add a squeeze of lemon/calamansi (optional) and black pepper.
Stuff the mixture inside the fish cavity.
Grill over medium heat about 10 to 12 minutes per side (longer for larger fish) until cooked through.
Serve with toyomansi (soy sauce + citrus) and steamed rice.
tips: Keep the scales on to help prevent sticking, or wrap in foil / use a grill basket; use two tools (tongs + spatula) when turning to keep the fish intact.
